$comment: Kit toolchain manifest — DATA only (versions, floors, policy); the check/install logic lives in lib/toolchain.sh and the per-tool install callbacks in each lib. kind: required (preflight hard dep) | check (doctor visibility only) | managed (kit installs/upgrades it). policy (managed only): track (upgrade toward latest, gated by `verified`) | present (install when missing, never upgrade). `verified` = last kit-tested version — anything above it prompts before install (--yes auto-accepts; non-TTY declines and falls back to the pinned `verified` when pinnable). Update `verified` after testing a new release.

claude.note: kit floor — `best` alias + Fable 5 need >=2.1.170 (mirrors settings minimumVersion)

codex.note: upstream-owned; standalone installer prints when missing

rtk.note: PreToolUse hook — supply-chain review before unverified upgrades; installer honors RTK_VERSION=vX.Y.Z pin

bun.note: runtime for effect-solutions + the docks-kit CLI; self-updates via `bun upgrade` when wanted

effect-solutions.note: Effect docs CLI (bun global) — track keeps it self-upgrading (pre-toolchain syncs only installed-when-absent)

agent-browser.note: browser-automation CLI (npm global); first install also downloads Chrome for Testing
